events.event_description: The U.S. Ambassador to Switzerland, Madeleine M. Kunin, was accredited to Liechtenstein as the first U.S. Ambassador, resident at Bern, establishing diplomatic relations.

evidence.quote: On February 10, 1997, U.S. Ambassador to Switzerland Madeleine M. Kunin was the first U.S. Ambassador accredited to Liechtenstein, resident at Bern.
